title: Kale Consultants South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Kale Consultants South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Kale Consultants South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Kale Consultants South Asia Partners:
Kale Consultants South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kale Consultants South Asia Partners!
